MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-UNDEAD_ARMY.title: Undead Army
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-BESTOW_CURSE.descr: Whenever target enemy is attacked this turn, they also gain {BestowCursePower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-BESTOW_CURSE.title: Bestow Curse
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-TRANSFUSION.descri: You cannot draw additional cards this turn. Transform all [gold]Souls[/gold] in your hand into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Life Forces+|Life Forces}[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-TRANSFUSION.title: Transfusion
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-LIFE_FORCE.descrip: Target player Heals {Heal:diff()} HP and gains 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity this turn.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-LIFE_FORCE.title: Life Force
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PARTY_MASCOT.descr: Until Osty dies, you and all allies gain {PartyMascotPower:diff()} Strength.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PARTY_MASCOT.title: Party Mascot
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SOUL_ECHOES.descri: The first time that you play a Soul each turn, all allies add a Soul to their hand.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SOUL_ECHOES.title: Soul Echoes
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RAISE_DEAD.descrip: Lose half your life and heal an ally by that amount.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RAISE_DEAD.title: Raise Dead
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-WITHER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The next debuff applied to this enemy is doubled.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-WITHER.title: Wither
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-STRIKE_RUSH.descri: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. A random ally {IfUpgraded:show:upgrades and|} plays a Strike from their draw pile at the target.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-STRIKE_RUSH.title: Strike Rush
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RICOCHET_BLADE.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. Put a temporary copy of this card into the hand of target ally
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FRONTLINER.descrip: Whenever an ally plays a card targeting you, gain 1 Strength.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FRONTLINER.title: Frontliner
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-INVIGORATE.descrip: Heal {Heal:diff()} HP for each ally that is below 50% HP.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-INVIGORATE.title: Invigorate
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SACRIFICIAL_PACT.d: Exhaust a card. You and all allies draw {Draw:diff()} card.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SHIELD_MASTER.desc: You can target allies with untargeted block cards. When you do, they gain 25% additional block.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-LAST_STAND.descrip: Until your next turn, if you would die, survive with 1 HP{IfUpgraded:show:, then gain 5 Strength|}.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-LAST_STAND.title: Last Stand
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SECOND_THAT.descri: Copy the next {IfUpgraded:show:2 skills played by allies|skill played by an ally} this turn.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SECOND_THAT.title: Second That
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FOLLOW_UP.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to each enemy that was attacked by an ally this turn.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FOLLOW_UP.title: Follow Up
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SPEED_TRAINING.des: For every {SpeedTrainingPower:diff()} cards you draw during your turn, all allies draw 1 card.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SMOKE_BOMB.descrip: Target player takes 50% less damage from Weakened enemies this turn. (They gain 5 Block).
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SMOKE_BOMB.title: Smoke Bomb
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-FLURRY_OF_BLADES.d: Whenever another player attacks an enemy this turn, play a {IfUpgraded:show:Shiv+|Shiv} targeting that enemy.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-GAMBLING_PARTY.des: All allies discard their hand and draw that many cards.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PICKPOCKET.descrip: Steal some gold. Steal more if an ally attacked this enemy this turn.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-PICKPOCKET.title: Pickpocket
